name_en: BOTTEGA VENETA New Mini Cabat Weave Basket Bag. Simple yet sophisticated, the intricate woven leather creates a complex effect with layered interlacing, taking the leather print from flat to three-dimensional. BV's most representative Cabat features unique craftsmanship and a unique weave, representing eternal fashion. The Mini Size is perfect for modern women, combining an elegant, casual attitude with ample capacity to fit your lifestyle.
